title: Runtime error: null pointer dereferenced on class field access

features.name: class field assignment via array index in loop
features.description: Code should include a for loop iterating over an unpacked array of class handles, creating instances and assigning to a class field
features.snippet:
class cls; int field_val; endclass
module t(); cls inst[1]; initial begin for(int i = 0; i < 1; i++) begin inst[i] = new(); inst[i].field_val = 1; end end endmodule

features.name: unpacked array of class handles
features.description: Code should include a declaration of an unpacked array of class handles
features.snippet:
class cls; int field_val; endclass
module t(); cls inst[1];

features.name: lhs evaluation of class field access via array index
features.description: Code should include an assignment to a class field accessed through an unpacked array index, where LHS evaluation triggers null pointer dereference
